description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI agents and LLMs to query and analyze Prometheus metrics through standardized interfaces.

findings.title: INSUFFICIENT_TOOL_DATA
findings.description: Tool 'admin' has no description - agents cannot reason about its purpose, and static analysis coverage is limited
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate the identified issue.
